denied.title: Organization access is limited
denied.message: You can open this workspace from the shell, but you do not have permission to view organization records.

organization.created: A new Organization is created with identifier {{ param }}
organization.updated: A Organization is updated with identifier {{ param }}
organization.deleted: A Organization is deleted with identifier {{ param }}

delete.title: Delete Organization
delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete this organization? This action cannot be undone.

workbench.subtitle: Inspect and change the root organization together with its departments and employees from one secured workspace.
workbench.departmentsHelp: Select a department to inspect its record and manage child employees without leaving the page.
workbench.employeeSectionHelp: This selected department stays editable from the same workbench flow.
workbench.employeeCrudHelp: Create, update, and delete employee records here, then reload the secured root graph.
workbench.emptyDepartments: No departments are linked to this organization yet.
workbench.emptyEmployees: No employees are linked to the selected department yet.
workbench.selectDepartment: Select a department on the left to open its employee workspace.
